name: add-dir
description: Adds an additional working directory to the current session's scope, expanding which files and directories Claude can access beyond the initial project root.

name: agents
description: Interactive UI for managing agent configurations -- viewing, creating, and editing the agent definitions that AgentTool uses when spawning sub-agents.

name: ant-trace
description: Internal-only (Anthropic) command for generating trace data from the current session, used for debugging and performance analysis. Stubbed out in external builds.

name: autofix-pr
description: Internal-only command that automatically fixes issues found in a pull request by running Claude against PR review comments. Stubbed out in external builds.

name: backfill-sessions
description: Internal-only command that retroactively processes and indexes historical session data. Stubbed out in external builds.

name: branch
description: Creates or switches to a git worktree branch for isolated experimentation, integrating with the worktree system to provide branch-level session isolation.

name: break-cache
description: Developer debugging command that invalidates prompt caches by injecting a unique string into the system prompt, forcing a fresh API request without cache hits.

name: bridge
description: Shows the status of and manages the WebSocket bridge connection used for remote control from mobile, web, and IDE surfaces.

name: btw
description: A side-question command that lets users ask a quick tangential question without disrupting the main conversation flow, running it through a separate lightweight query.

name: bughunter
description: Internal-only command for systematic bug hunting in the codebase. Stubbed out in external builds.

name: chrome
description: Manages the Chrome extension integration, offering setup, permissions configuration, and connection status for the Claude-in-Chrome experience.

name: clear
description: Clears the current conversation history and optionally purges various caches (session, file state, MCP connections) to start fresh.

name: color
description: Changes the terminal color output settings, toggling between color modes for accessibility or preference.

name: compact
description: Triggers manual context compaction, summarizing the conversation so far to free up token budget while preserving key information for continued work.

name: config
description: Opens an interactive settings editor for viewing and modifying Claude Code configuration at project or global scope, with aliases for /settings.

name: context
description: Displays the current context window contents including system prompt, CLAUDE.md files, conversation messages, and token usage breakdown, useful for understanding what the model sees.

name: copy
description: Copies the last assistant response or a specified conversation segment to the system clipboard for easy sharing.

name: cost
description: Displays a detailed breakdown of API token usage and estimated costs for the current session, including per-model and cache statistics.

name: ctx_viz
description: Internal-only context visualization command for debugging prompt composition. Stubbed out in external builds.

name: debug-tool-call
description: Internal-only debugging command for inspecting tool call payloads and execution details. Stubbed out in external builds.

name: desktop
description: Hands off the current session to the Claude Desktop application, enabling continuation of the conversation in a richer GUI environment.

name: diff
description: Shows a diff view of all file changes made during the current conversation, rendered as a scrollable dialog with syntax highlighting.

name: doctor
description: Runs diagnostic checks on the Claude Code installation, verifying API connectivity, authentication status, tool availability, and configuration validity.

name: effort
description: Adjusts the reasoning effort level for subsequent model responses, controlling the depth of thinking the model applies to each turn.

name: env
description: Internal-only command for inspecting environment variables and runtime configuration. Stubbed out in external builds.

name: exit
description: Gracefully exits the Claude Code session, running cleanup handlers, saving session state, and displaying the cost summary.

name: export
description: Exports the current conversation to a file in various formats (plain text, markdown, JSON), providing a portable record of the session.

name: extra-usage
description: Manages overage billing settings for Claude.ai subscribers, allowing users to enable or configure pay-per-use beyond their plan's included limits.

name: fast
description: Toggles fast mode which routes queries to a smaller, faster model (like Haiku) for quick interactions where full Opus-level reasoning isn't needed.

name: feedback
description: Submits user feedback about Claude Code directly to the development team, collecting structured reports with optional session context.

name: files
description: Lists all files that have been read or modified during the current session, providing an audit trail of the model's filesystem interactions.

name: good-claude
description: Internal-only positive feedback command used by Anthropic employees to flag exemplary model behavior for training data. Stubbed out in external builds.

name: heapdump
description: Developer debugging command that dumps the JavaScript heap to disk for memory analysis and leak investigation.

name: help
description: Displays the full list of available slash commands with descriptions, organized by category, and shows keyboard shortcuts.

name: hooks
description: Interactive viewer for the configured lifecycle hooks, showing which events have registered hooks and their current status.

name: ide
description: Manages IDE integration settings and displays the connection status for supported editors (VS Code, JetBrains), enabling bidirectional communication between Claude Code and the IDE.

name: init.ts
description: Generates a CLAUDE.md file by analyzing the project's codebase structure, build system, and conventions, creating a context document for future Claude sessions.

name: install-github-app
description: Multi-step wizard for installing the Claude GitHub App on a repository, configuring API keys, checking existing secrets, and creating the GitHub Actions integration.

name: install-slack-app
description: Installs the Claude Slack App integration, connecting Claude Code capabilities to a Slack workspace.

name: install.tsx
description: Handles native binary installation and upgrade of Claude Code, replacing npm-based installations with the native installer, configuring shell integration, and verifying the installed version.

name: issue
description: Internal-only command for creating GitHub issues from within a session. Stubbed out in external builds.

name: keybindings
description: Editor for viewing and customizing keyboard shortcut mappings, with validation against reserved shortcuts and persistence to ~/.claude/keybindings.json.

name: login
description: Initiates the OAuth authentication flow for Claude.ai or API key entry, handling the PKCE flow, device code grant, and credential storage.

name: logout
description: Clears stored authentication credentials and OAuth tokens, signing the user out of their current identity.

name: mcp
description: Manages Model Context Protocol server connections, providing sub-commands for adding, removing, configuring, and monitoring MCP servers attached to the session.

name: memory
description: Views and edits the persistent memory files (CLAUDE.md and memory directory entries) that carry context across sessions.

name: mobile
description: Displays a QR code and URL for connecting to the current session from a mobile device through the remote bridge.

name: mock-limits
description: Internal-only testing command for simulating rate limit scenarios with mock API response headers. Stubbed out in external builds.

name: model
description: Switches the active model for subsequent queries, with validation of available models and display of the current selection.

name: oauth-refresh
description: Internal-only command for manually refreshing OAuth tokens. Stubbed out in external builds.

name: onboarding
description: Internal-only command for replaying the onboarding experience. Stubbed out in external builds.

name: output-style
description: Deprecated command (now in /config) that previously let users change Claude's response formatting style.

name: passes
description: Manages Claude Code passes and referral rewards for Claude.ai subscribers, showing eligibility status and referral links.

name: perf-issue
description: Internal-only command for reporting performance issues with diagnostic data. Stubbed out in external builds.

name: permissions
description: Interactive manager for tool permission rules, allowing users to view, add, and remove allow/deny rules that control which tools the model can use without asking.

name: plan
description: Enters plan mode or displays the current session plan, where the model outlines its approach in a structured plan file before executing changes.

name: plugin
description: Full-featured plugin management interface with marketplace browsing, installation, trust verification, settings configuration, and update management.

name: pr_comments
description: Fetches and displays comments from a GitHub pull request, now implemented as a plugin redirect via the createMovedToPluginCommand pattern.

name: privacy-settings
description: Views and updates privacy settings for consumer subscribers, controlling data retention and telemetry preferences.

name: rate-limit-options
description: Shows available options when a rate limit is reached for Claude.ai subscribers, including upgrade paths and wait time estimates.

name: release-notes
description: Displays the release notes for the current and recent versions of Claude Code, highlighting new features and changes.

name: reload-plugins
description: Hot-reloads plugin configurations and applies pending changes to the running session without requiring a restart.

name: remote-env
description: Configures the default remote environment settings for teleported sessions, controlling which cloud environment is used for Claude Code on the web.

name: remote-setup
description: Multi-step wizard for setting up Claude Code on the web, including GitHub account connection and remote session configuration.

name: rename
description: Renames the current conversation session, either with a user-provided name or by auto-generating one from the conversation content.

name: reset-limits
description: Internal-only command for resetting rate limit counters during testing. Stubbed out in external builds.

name: resume
description: Presents a picker for browsing and resuming previous conversation sessions, with search, session metadata display, and continuation from where you left off.

name: review
description: Runs an AI-powered code review of a GitHub PR, analyzing the diff for quality issues, risks, and improvement suggestions. Supports both local and web-based (ultrareview) modes.

name: review.ts
description: Runs an AI-powered code review of a GitHub PR, analyzing the diff for quality issues, risks, and improvement suggestions. Supports both local and web-based (ultrareview) modes.

name: rewind
description: Restores files and/or conversation state to a previous checkpoint, using file history snapshots to undo changes made during the session.

name: sandbox-toggle
description: Toggles the filesystem sandbox on or off and configures auto-allow-bash-if-sandboxed behavior, giving users control over the security boundary.

name: session
description: Displays the current remote session URL and QR code when running in remote mode, enabling easy connection from other devices.

name: share
description: Internal-only command for sharing session transcripts. Stubbed out in external builds.

name: skills
description: Lists all available skills (from SKILL.md files and plugins) with their descriptions, showing what specialized capabilities can be invoked.

name: stats
description: Shows personal Claude Code usage statistics and activity metrics, including session counts, token usage history, and usage patterns.

name: status
description: Displays comprehensive system status including version, active model, account type, API connectivity, MCP server health, and tool availability.

name: stickers
description: A fun Easter egg command that lets users order physical Claude Code stickers.

name: summary
description: Internal-only command for generating session summaries. Stubbed out in external builds.

name: tag
description: Internal-only (Anthropic) command for adding searchable tags to sessions, enabling organization and retrieval of sessions by topic or project.

name: tasks
description: Lists and manages background tasks (sub-agents, shell processes, dreams) with status display, output viewing, and task termination controls.

name: teleport
description: Internal-only command for teleporting a session to a remote cloud environment. Stubbed out in external builds.

name: terminalSetup
description: Guides users through terminal configuration for optimal Claude Code experience, detecting terminal capabilities (CSI u, Kitty protocol) and suggesting settings.

name: theme
description: Interactive theme picker for switching between visual themes that control colors, borders, and styling across the entire terminal UI.

name: thinkback
description: A year-in-review experience that generates a personalized retrospective of your Claude Code usage, including statistics, highlights, and animated playback.

name: thinkback-play
description: Hidden companion to /think-back that plays the generated retrospective animation after the thinkback skill finishes producing it.

name: ultraplan.tsx
description: Launches an ultra-planning session that runs on Claude Code on the web (CCR), spawning a remote multi-agent exploration with a 30-minute timeout for deep architectural planning.

name: upgrade
description: Presents Claude.ai subscribers with upgrade options for higher-tier plans that offer increased rate limits and more access to Opus.

name: usage
description: Shows current plan usage limits and consumption for Claude.ai subscribers, including remaining quota and reset timing.

name: version.ts
description: Prints the current Claude Code version and build timestamp.

name: vim
description: Toggles between Vim and normal editing modes in the REPL input, persisting the preference across sessions.

name: voice
description: Toggles voice input mode on or off, enabling push-to-talk audio transcription through the voice service.
